layout_note: Typed attachment table, transposed spreadsheet layout: one asset per column, attribute labels down the left (EIF; SP/DC/JT; Stock Name; Ticker; Transaction; Value of Asset A-L + Spouse/DC; Type of Income; Amount of Income A-K + Spouse/DC). Selections are black-filled cells. Running header 'M and R Schedule A' (M and R portfolio). Four asset columns on this page: ADOBE INC(ADBE), ALLERGAN PLC SHS, TRG II ONSHORE(All14), CPI ASIA ONSHORE - CLASS B(All51).
